texto: I was OK in school, but I always missed a lot because I was playing so much. But if I'd stuck at it, I imagine that I'd be doing something financial or economical. Finance always attracted me, even though maths was always a bit of a love-hate relationship. I would have tried playing football, but I don't think I'd have made it.
explicacao: Citação de Matteo Manassero sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I was OK in school, but I always missed a lot because I was playing so much. But if I'd stuck at …” articula reflexao, relationship, football em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como football.
